title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: An IBM podcast episode examines how AI is reshaping software engineering roles, discusses tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, covers NVIDIA's RTX Spark for deploying large models on personal computers, and explores challenges for universities preparing students for AI-transformed workplaces.
